name: synapse2
description: MCP server for Docker and SSH host management — exposes flux (Docker/container/compose/host) and scout (SSH exec/filesystem/ZFS/logs) tools across configured infrastructure hosts.
author: Jacob Magar

settings.name: server_url
settings.description: Base URL of the MCP HTTP server. Keep http://localhost:40060 for local use; set to https://synapse2.yourdomain.com for a remote server. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp.

settings.name: api_token
settings.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication. Every request to /mcp includes: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

settings.name: synapse_api_url
settings.description: Optional upstream service base URL (SYNAPSE_API_URL). Consumed by the upstream-client facade and the synapse2 doctor health check; the core flux/scout tools drive Docker and SSH hosts directly and do not require this.

settings.name: synapse_api_key
settings.description: Optional API key or bearer token (SYNAPSE_API_KEY) paired with synapse_api_url for the upstream-client facade. Leave empty when only using flux/scout.
